Bash(python3 -c "
import time
# The slug timestamp we saw: 1773124200
slug_ts = 1773124200
print\(f'Slug timestamp: {slug_ts}'\)
print\(f'Slug ts mod 300: {slug_ts % 300}'\)
from datetime import datetime, timezone
print\(f'Slug ts as UTC: {datetime.fromtimestamp\(slug_ts, tz=timezone.utc\).isoformat\(\)}'\)
print\(f'Slug ts + 300:  {datetime.fromtimestamp\(slug_ts + 300, tz=timezone.utc\).isoformat\(\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('From the API response:'\)
print\(f'  endDate:         2026-03-10T06:35:00Z'\)
print\(f'  startTime:       2026-03-10T06:30:00Z'\)
print\(f'  eventStartTime:  2026-03-10T06:30:00Z'\)
print\(f'  title:           Bitcoin Up or Down - March 10, 2:30AM-2:35AM ET'\)
print\(\)
print\('Analysis:'\)
print\(f'  slug_ts \(1773124200\) => 2026-03-10T06:30:00Z = window START'\)
print\(f'  slug_ts + 300        => 2026-03-10T06:35:00Z = window END = endDate'\)
print\(f'  eventStartTime       => 2026-03-10T06:30:00Z = window START'\)
print\(f'  Title says 2:30AM-2:35AM ET which is 6:30-6:35 UTC'\)
print\(\)
# Current time
now = int\(time.time\(\)\)
current_window = \(now // 300\) * 300
print\(f'Current time: {now}'\)
print\(f'Current window start: {current_window} = {datetime.fromtimestamp\(current_window, tz=timezone.utc\).isoformat\(\)}'\)
print\(f'Current window end:   {current_window + 300} = {datetime.fromtimestamp\(current_window + 300, tz=timezone.utc\).isoformat\(\)}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import time
now = int\(time.time\(\)\)
w = \(now // 300\) * 300
# Check current, next, and previous windows
for label, ts in [\('previous', w-300\), \('current', w\), \('next', w+300\)]:
    print\(f'{label}: btc-updown-5m-{ts}'\)
")

Bash(curl -s "https://gamma-api.polymarket.com/events?slug=btc-updown-5m-1773124500" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if data:
    ev = data[0]
    print\('Current window event:'\)
    print\(f'  slug: {ev.get\(\\"slug\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  title: {ev.get\(\\"title\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  startTime: {ev.get\(\\"startTime\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  endDate: {ev.get\(\\"endDate\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  eventMetadata: {ev.get\(\\"eventMetadata\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  active: {ev.get\(\\"active\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'  closed: {ev.get\(\\"closed\\"\)}'\)
    if ev.get\('markets'\):
        m = ev['markets'][0]
        print\(f'  eventStartTime: {m.get\(\\"eventStartTime\\"\)}'\)
        print\(f'  acceptingOrders: {m.get\(\\"acceptingOrders\\"\)}'\)
else:
    print\('No data returned'\)
" 2>/dev/null)
